description: Review Workflow Step - Add a Review step (step 5) to the workflow wizard for automated code reviews with Done/Fix & Re-run actions

userStories.title: Add review provider columns to projects table
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to store each project's review provider and review model variant in the database so they persist across sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Add review_provider column to projects table (TEXT, nullable, e.g. 'claude' or 'codex')
Add review_model_variant column to projects table (TEXT, nullable)
Migration is idempotent (safe to run multiple times)
Existing projects get NULL for both columns (no default review provider)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Update runner script to pick up review-feedback.md
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the Ralph runner to include review-feedback.md as context when it exists, so Fix & Re-run passes review findings to the next run.
acceptanceCriteria: Runner script checks for scripts/ralph/review-feedback.md at startup
If the file exists, its contents are prepended to the context for the Ralph run (e.g. appended to initial message or injected as REVIEW_FEEDBACK env var)
After a successful run, review-feedback.md is automatically deleted
If review-feedback.md does not exist, the runner behaves exactly as before (no regression)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: API endpoints for review provider settings
userStories.description: As a developer, I need API endpoints to get and set the review provider and model variant per-project.
acceptanceCriteria: PUT /api/projects/:id/review-provider accepts { provider: string | null } and updates review_provider column; setting to null also clears review_model_variant
PUT /api/projects/:id/review-model-variant accepts { modelVariant: string } and updates review_model_variant column
Returns 404 if project not found, 400 if provider name is invalid
GET /api/projects/:id/status response includes review_provider and review_model_variant fields
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create reviewRunner service
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a dedicated service that spawns and manages review processes for both Codex and Claude providers uniformly.
acceptanceCriteria: New file backend/src/services/reviewRunner.ts with startReview(projectId, baseBranch), stopReview(projectId), getStatus(projectId), getOutput(projectId, since) methods
For Claude provider: spawns claude CLI with --print flag and a fixed prompt invoking /simplify with base branch context
For Codex provider: spawns codex exec review --base <baseBranch> in the project directory
Injects provider-specific env vars (API keys) from the provider's config using getEnvVars() — reuses existing provider auth
Buffers output (max 500 lines) consistent with existing processManager/skillRunner patterns
Supports stopping a running review (kills process group)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Review API routes
userStories.description: As a developer, I need API endpoints to start, stop, and stream review output so the frontend can control the review process.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/projects/:id/review/start accepts { baseBranch: string }, starts review using project's configured review provider
Returns 400 if no review provider configured, 409 if review already running
POST /api/projects/:id/review/stop stops a running review
GET /api/projects/:id/review/status returns { running: boolean, exitCode?: number } matching existing runner/skill status shape
GET /api/projects/:id/review/output?since=N returns buffered output lines since index N
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Archive API endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an API endpoint that archives the current prd.json and progress files and resets the workflow.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/projects/:id/archive creates scripts/ralph/archive/{YYYY-MM-DD}-{featureName}/ directory in the project
Moves scripts/ralph/prd.json into the archive folder
Moves scripts/ralph/progress.txt into the archive folder (if it exists)
Moves .last-branch into the archive folder (if it exists)
Cleans up scripts/ralph/review-feedback.md if it exists
Feature name is derived from prd.json's project field (kebab-cased)
If archive folder already exists (same day, same feature), appends a numeric suffix (-2, -3)
Returns 404 if project not found, 400 if no prd.json exists to archive
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add review provider settings UI to project settings
userStories.description: As a user, I want to configure which provider and model variant are used for code reviews on my project.
acceptanceCriteria: Project settings panel shows a Review Provider dropdown alongside existing provider/model dropdowns
Dropdown lists available providers (claude, codex) or shows Not configured when null
When a review provider is selected, a Review Model dropdown appears listing that provider's model variants
Selecting a provider/model variant calls API to persist the choice
Clearing the review provider also clears the review model variant
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Save review feedback API endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an API endpoint that saves review output to a file so the next run can pick it up as context.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/projects/:id/review/save-feedback saves the current review output to scripts/ralph/review-feedback.md in the project directory
File content is the full review output as plain text/markdown
Returns 400 if no review output exists (review hasn't run)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Review step UI in workflow wizard
userStories.description: As a user, I want a Review step (step 5) in the workflow wizard where I can enter a base branch, start a review, and see the output streamed in real-time.
acceptanceCriteria: WorkflowWizard shows 5 steps: Questions, PRD, prd.json, Run, Review
WizardStepIndicator renders the 5th Review step
Review step is visible/navigable once workflow state is prd-json-ready (same as Run)
Review step shows a base branch text input pre-filled with main
Start Review button triggers POST /api/projects/:id/review/start with the entered base branch
Start Review button is disabled if no review provider is configured; shows a message linking to project settings
While review runs, output streams in the log viewer (same component/style as Run output)
Stop Review button appears while review is running
Review is re-runnable — user can click Start Review again after completion (previous output replaced)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Post-review actions (Done and Fix & Re-run)
userStories.description: As a user, after a review completes I want to either archive the project (Done) or send the feedback back to the Run step for fixes (Fix & Re-run).
acceptanceCriteria: After review completes (process exits), two buttons appear: Done and Fix & Re-run
Done button creates an archive snapshot via POST /api/projects/:id/archive, then resets workflow to no-files and shows success message
Fix & Re-run button saves review output via POST /api/projects/:id/review/save-feedback, then navigates wizard back to the Run step (step 4)
Both buttons are disabled while review is still running
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Skip Review option
userStories.description: As a user, I want to skip the review step and go straight to archiving when I don't need a code review.
acceptanceCriteria: Review step shows a Skip & Archive button that is always visible, even before running a review
Clicking it shows a brief confirmation dialog: Archive this feature without reviewing?
On confirmation, triggers the same archive flow as the Done button via POST /api/projects/:id/archive
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
